name: 100ms
description: Reads 100ms rooms, sessions, recordings, templates, live streams, external streams, recording assets, and webhook events, and writes room/template/room-code/recording lifecycle mutations, through the 100ms server-side REST API.

risk.read: external 100ms API read of rooms, sessions, recordings, templates, live streams, external streams, recording assets, and webhook events
risk.write: external 100ms mutation: creates/updates rooms, creates templates, creates/updates room join-codes, and starts/stops room recordings; approval required
